modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to access D2L due to Internet Explorer support issue.

full_description_text:  
So, I was trying to get into D2L, but it keeps saying that Internet Explorer isn't supported anymore. I remember reading that they stopped supporting it back in January 2020, but I didn't think it would affect me this much. Now I'm stuck and not sure what to do next.
short_description: Unable to access D2L due to Internet Explorer support issue.
description: So, I was trying to get into D2L, but it keeps saying that Internet Explorer isn't supported anymore. I remember reading that they stopped supporting it back in January 2020, but I didn't think it would affect me this much. Now I'm stuck and not sure what to do next.
